message:
feat(fp-frame): add chrono-tz support and rewrite timezone handling

Replace naive string-based timezone offset arithmetic with proper chrono
and chrono-tz parsing. Add TzLocalizeOptions for DST ambiguity/nonexistence
policies, IANA timezone support via chrono-tz, and robust tz_localize and
tz_convert implementations with correct UTC conversion.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
